description: Intensive and immersive full-stack software development program focusing on modern web technologies and agile development practices.
Tech Stack: JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Next.js, Express.js, Node.js, and PostgreSQL.
Core Competencies: RESTful API Design, Relational Database Management, Responsive Web Design, State Management, and Full-Stack Application Architecture.
Activities and societies: Staff of Community Service Department (2017-2019), Theater Tiyang Alit (2017), Volley Ball (2018), member of Earth Inspiration Class (2017-2019).
Bachelor's Thesis: Safety Monitoring of Lusi (Lumpur Sidoarjo) Embankment In P-10 D Using 3D Resistivity Method.
Field measurement assistant using Resistivity 3D, GPR, Seismic, Gravity and Magnetic in Lusi (Lumpur Sidoarjo) Embankment.
Field measurement assistant using GPR, Gravity and Geology in geological fault Probolinggo.
Field measurement assistant using MT (Magnetotelluric) in Gresik, Lamongan and Surabaya.
